legalStructure: Legacy Ribbon DAO governance/protocol token; not verified as a registered fund, note, credit pool, or tokenized RWA claim instrument. RGP-33 proposed folding Ribbon into Aevo and enabling RBN holders to migrate to AEVO 1:1.
targetInvestors: DeFi users, protocol participants, RBN holders, and governance participants; not a documented regulated fund-share investor base.

classification.classificationNote: RBN is a legacy Ribbon DAO governance token. It is related to DeFi structured products and, historically, Ribbon Lend/Treasury products, but it does not represent a direct claim on loans, Treasuries, reserves, collateral, or fund shares. Track any specific Ribbon/Aevo vault or credit product separately if Nexus wants product-level RWA exposure.

metadata.migrationStatus: RGP-33 proposed RBN-to-AEVO migration at a 1:1 exchange rate and Ribbonomics wind-down.
metadata.assetModelQuestion: RBN should be tracked as a legacy governance/protocol token. Ribbon Lend, Ribbon Treasury, structured-product vaults, or Aevo products should be modeled separately if they represent investable exposure.
institutionalGradeBlockers: No verified prospectus, offering memorandum, legal opinion, fund administrator, or transfer agent for RBN.
RBN does not represent a direct legal/economic claim on RWA collateral.
RBN-to-AEVO migration creates legacy-token continuity and liquidity risk.

_meta.notes: Classification-first treatment follows Nexus governance_protocol profile. Reserve, custody, redemption, and PoR fields are intentionally not applicable, not missing.
